log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Verdan — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Verdan — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Verdan — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 10 damage. Verdan — Armored Tank HP: 49/59
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 26 damage. Verdan — Armored Tank HP: 23/59
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Verdan — Armored Tank --- HP: 23/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 15] FAIL. Still paralyzed.

--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18

→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 17 damage. Verdan — Armored Tank HP: 6/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):19+4=23 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 20] HIT! 12 damage. Verdan — Armored Tank HP: -6/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
